text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm stopping by the<n>central plaza, I
spot Inari One and<n>Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Cleats and textbooks?<n>What're
these doing 'round here?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Flea market, don'tcha think? Just<n>look at how
they're organized.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and take them... if you'd<n>like. A loser
like me won't be needing<n>them anymore...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh? Izzat so?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so hasty! How d'ya know<n>you're
never gonna wanna run again<n>in the future, eh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tama, c'mon, ya gotta play it a li'l<n>cooler than
that. Don't force it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wait. That photo you've got there,<n>was it taken
during a race? You're<n>givin' this away too?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh, a photo? I don't remember... Did<n>I mix it up
when I was organizing my<n>things?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh... This was when I won my first<n>race. What's
it doing here?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Look at the big ol' smile ya got there!<n>I knew
it—you do love raci—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, ya don't need this no more! It'll<n>just hold
ya back!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go toss this away for ya!<n>I'll be back
in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh, wh-what are you—W-w-wait up!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Come back, Inari! Return the girl's<n>photo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Not a chance! This is going where it<n>belongs! If
you want it back, you'll<n>have to catch me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Come on! Catch me if you can!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You just gonna sit there 'n let that<n>idiot run
away? She's serious,<n>y'know?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Phew... Looks like they aren't onmy tail anymore. I wonder if theygave up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: WAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Haha! You'd scare a boiled<n>octopus back
to life with that face!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm having fun! Come at me!<n>I'm so ready
for a tussle!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaaa... Haah... Hnnng...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Eager to retrieve her photo, the<n>Umamusume
makes a mad dash for<n>Inari One... before
stopping herself.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Why... Why?! I already made up<n>my mind to
quit...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Talk to me, how are you feeling?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to catch up so badly... Losing<n>was so,
so frustrating but... I still want<n>to win!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, I think that settles it. Sounds like<n>you've got
some racin' to do.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Glad ya decided to give it another go!<n>And Inari,
nice goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just remember it's all uphill from<n>here. You're
treadin' a thorny path of<n>blood, sweat, and tears.
But once<n>you've overcome it, let's tussle
again!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Looks like all's well that<n>ends well!
